methodology: Playwright browser scraping of public-facing pages. Claims reflect only what each website publicly states at time of research. 'Not found on site' means the information was not present on public pages visited.

cag.name: CongoAfricanGreys.com
cag.cites_quote: All birds are CITES Appendix II captive-bred with full documentation provided at sale
cag.notes: Family breeder, Midland TX, operational since 2014. USDA AWA licensed. All birds hand-raised.

competitors.name: Afri Grey Parrots
competitors.price_range: Not displayed on homepage (uses 'cheap' pricing language throughout)
competitors.notes: Payment methods listed on site include bank transfer, CashApp, and PayPal Friends & Family — the latter two remove buyer protection. No CITES documentation mentioned. No USDA AWA license number displayed. Promises 48-hour delivery.

competitors.name: Exotic Parrot Pet Store
competitors.price_range: $1,100–$3,800 (birds shown with heavy discounts from higher 'original' prices)
competitors.notes: States: 'Each bird comes with a health certificate, vet record, and a 14-day health guarantee.' Worldwide shipping stated. No CITES documentation mentioned. No USDA AWA license number displayed. All bird prices shown with significant discounts from original prices.

competitors.name: African Gray Parrots For Sale
competitors.price_range: Not displayed — contact for current pricing
competitors.notes: Trust bar states 'DNA Tested Birds' and 'Health Guarantee.' Claims to be 'Certified Breeder' but no USDA AWA license number visible. No CITES documentation mentioned. No prices displayed — contact required. Partner sites section links to 'My Russian Blue Kittens' suggesting multi-species template site. Social media icons link to generic platform homepages, not to breeder-specific accounts.

competitors.name: Silvergate Bird Farm
competitors.notes: Page loaded but displayed minimal text content — site is heavily JavaScript-dependent. Page title shows 'Exotic Birds Store' (not Silvergate Bird Farm). WhatsApp chat widget visible. Could not determine documentation practices, pricing, or shipping details from public pages.

competitors.name: Birds For Sales
competitors.price_range: African Grey listed at $770 (well below market rate of $1,700+)
competitors.cites_quote: Ethical: Captive-bred, CITES-compliant, vet-checked (stated for Mynah bird listing — not stated for African Grey listing)
competitors.notes: African Grey listed at $770 — significantly below market rate. CITES compliance stated for Mynah bird, not for African Grey listing. 'DEFRA-approved transport' referenced (DEFRA is a UK government standard, not a US one). Sells multiple species. Phone: +1(979)309-8438.

competitors.name: Exotic Parrots Planet
competitors.location: Not stated (claims global: USA, Canada, Middle East, UK, Russia, Thailand)
competitors.price_range: $800–$900 for African Grey (well below market rate of $1,700+)
competitors.notes: African Greys listed at $800–$900, significantly below market rate. Also sells parrot eggs and incubators. Claims to be 'the global leader' with no verifiable credentials. No CITES documentation, DNA sexing, or USDA AWA license mentioned.

competitors.name: Fifty Shades of African Greys
competitors.notes: Small independent breeder in West St. Paul, MN. Currently shows 'All of our babies have found families!' (no birds available at time of research). Also listed on BirdBreeders.com directory. Direct contact info (phone: 701-212-9733, email: fiftyshadesofafricangreys@gmail.com) provided. No CITES or USDA information visible on public pages.

competitors.name: Compound Exotics
competitors.price_range: Not checked for African Grey specifically
competitors.notes: States '1 year health guarantee for all our exotic pets on sale' in site header. Sells many species including otters, raccoons, skunks, capuchin monkeys, and sugar gliders — many of which are highly regulated or restricted in multiple US states. 5 African Grey parrots listed. All items displayed at 50% discount. No CITES documentation or USDA AWA license mentioned.

aggregators.name: BirdsNow
aggregators.type: Classified listing site — individual sellers post their own listings. The platform does not sell birds directly and does not appear to verify seller CITES documentation or credentials.
aggregators.cites_policy: Not found on public pages — individual sellers determine their own documentation practices

aggregators.name: BirdBreeders
aggregators.type: Breeder directory — connects buyers with individual breeders. Has a review and rating system. Some legitimate breeders are listed (e.g., Fifty Shades of African Greys, Parrot Stars).
aggregators.verified_seller_program: Uses 'trusted breeders' and featured breeder terminology; verification standards not detailed on public homepage

confirmed_scams.name: Exotic Pets Avenue
confirmed_scams.reason: Confirmed scam during competitor research (2026-04-28): lists protected species at prices far below market with no CITES documentation. Do not contact or send money to this site.
